value_alignment.note: Prioritizes academics first but also explicitly protects health (breaks/sleep) and includes relationships via teammate_A updates.

communication_style.note: Plans for direct, text-friendly, low-overcommitment updates and a single concrete question—compromise/avoid-conflict aligned.

decision_tendencies.note: Shows medium-horizon planning with fairly high risk-tolerance, but repeatedly adapts to low energy (consistent with procrastination bias rather than truly avoiding it).

goal_coherence.note: Goals evolve plausibly turn-to-turn, with g1 steadily progressing to a “submitted okay” baseline while g2/g3/g4 remain consistent.

weakness_expression.note: Stress/sleep-debt-driven compression appears (energy dropping to ~0 and prioritizing ‘minimum viable’ states), but mitigation breaks/stop-time prevent a more suspicious fully-managed flaw.

overall.summary: Strong match overall: the trajectory consistently balances academics, health, and relationships with compromising, direct communication; only moderate expression of ‘tired achiever’ weakness.
